items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding optional biz scoping for business-specific endpoints. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or records confirming the existence or state of these specific endpoints. The linked use case mentions the need for these records but lacks concrete evidence of their implementation or status, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
